prompt: Create a seven-panel executive carousel for 'GitHub Is the Control Plane for This Knowledge System'. Panels: 1 title; 2 a chat or folder is not a control plane; 3 workspace versus control plane; 4 what the control plane preserves; 5 degraded-mode continuity; 6 version control for knowledge; 7 operating principle: separate the workspace from the control plane. Use architecture diagrams, restrained typography, and no platform screenshots.
proof_boundaries: Represent GitHub as the current control plane, not permanent architecture.
Do not imply all synchronization is automatic.
Do not portray Drive as generally unavailable.
